! Title: AdBlockID - Annoyances
! Description: Remove Pop-Ups, cookie warnings and other annoyances.
! Last modified: Thu, 16 Jul 2026 17:45:25 GMT
! Expires: 6 days
! Homepage: https://github.com/realodix/AdBlockID
! License: https://github.com/realodix/AdBlockID/blob/main/LICENSE
